prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: large blue metal cylinder
  - obj_1: small blue rubber cube
  - obj_2: small blue metal sphere
  - obj_3: small green rubber sphere
  - obj_4: small yellow metal cube
  - obj_5: small purple rubber sphere
  - obj_6: large yellow rubber sphere
  - obj_7: small green rubber cylinder
  - obj_8: large green metal cylinder
  - obj_9: small green rubber sphere

Questions:
[qrr_0441] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0442] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0443] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0444] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_8 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0445] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0446] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0447] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0448] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0449] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0450] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0451] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0452] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0453] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0454] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0455] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0456] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0457] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0458] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_8 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0459] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0460] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >

- obj_0: large blue metal cylinder
- obj_1: small blue rubber cube
- obj_2: small blue metal sphere
- obj_3: small green rubber sphere (front)
- obj_4: small yellow metal cube
- obj_5: small purple rubber sphere
- obj_6: large yellow rubber sphere
- obj_7: small green rubber cylinder
- obj_8: large green metal cylinder
- obj_9: small green rubber sphere (right side)

Let me estimate 3D positions from the multiple views:
- obj_0 (large blue cylinder): front-center area
- obj_1 (blue rubber cube): behind-left area
- obj_2 (blue metal sphere): center area
- obj_3 (green rubber sphere front): front-center
- obj_4 (yellow metal cube): center-right
- obj_5 (purple rubber sphere): behind area
- obj_6 (large yellow sphere): center-left, large
- obj_7 (green rubber cylinder): center-front
- obj_8 (large green metal cylinder): left-center
- obj_9 (green rubber sphere right): right-center
